Part.Source:
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&sdtGravaPedido.PedCliCod = PedCliCod &sdtGravaPedido.LctCod = LctCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedRspCod = PedRspCod
&sdtGravaPedido.PedFicCod = PedFicCod
&sdtGravaPedido.PedDtaEms = PedDtaEms &sdtGravaPedido.PedDtaPrv = PedDtaPrv &sdtGravaPedido.PedDtaEve = PedDtaEve &sdtGravaPedido.PedDtaRetCon = PedDtaRetCon
&sdtGravaPedido.TabCod = TabCod &sdtGravaPedido.TabPrmCod = TabPrmCod
&sdtGravaPedido.TabColCod = TabColCod
&sdtGravaPedido.PedNum = PedNum &sdtGravaPedido.PedVenCod = PedVenCod
&sdtGravaPedido.PedNovCliRaz = PedNovCliRaz &sdtGravaPedido.PedNovCliCpfCnpj = PedNovCliCpfCnpj
//FINANCEIRO &sdtGravaPedido.PedPraCod = PedPraCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedFrpPgtoCod = PedFrpPgtoCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedPraParNom = PedPraParNom
//TRANSPORTE &sdtGravaPedido.PedTraRedCod = PedTraRedCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedTipFrt = PedTipFrt &sdtGravaPedido.PedTraRedVeiPla = PedTraRedVeiPla &sdtGravaPedido.PedRomCha = PedRomCha &sdtGravaPedido.PedRomCrt = PedRomCrt
&sdtGravaPedido.PedTraSaiCod = PedTraSaiCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedTipSaiFrt = PedTipSaiFrt
&sdtGravaPedido.PedObsEst = PedObsEst &sdtGravaPedido.PedObsFin = PedObsFin &sdtGravaPedido.PedObsGer = PedObsGer &sdtGravaPedido.PedObsNfe = PedObsNfe
&sdtGravaPedido.PedTpcCod = PedTpcCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedFatFilCod = PedFatFilCod
&sdtGravaPedido.PedVlrDscGlb = PedVlrDscGlb &sdtGravaPedido.PedVlrOutCus = PedVlrOutCus &sdtGravaPedido.PedVlrGnre = PedVlrGnre &sdtGravaPedido.PedVlrIpi = PedVlrIpi &sdtGravaPedido.PedVlrOut = PedVlrOut &sdtGravaPedido.PedPerFrt = PedPerFrt &sdtGravaPedido.PedFrtFix = PedFrtFix
&sdtGravaPedido.PedPerSpm1 = PedPerSpm1 &sdtGravaPedido.PedPerSpm2 = PedPerSpm2
&sdtGravaPedido.PedPerPrm1 = PedPerPrm1 &sdtGravaPedido.PedPerPrm2 = PedPerPrm2
&sdtGravaPedido.PedPerSrv1 = PedPerSrv1 &sdtGravaPedido.PedPerSrv2 = PedPerSrv2
&sdtGravaPedido.PedPrpCod = PedPrpCod
&sdtGravaPedido.PedCodOciRef = PedCodOciRef
&sdtGravaPedido.PedCbrCod = PedCbrCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedCtaBanCod = PedCtaBanCod
&sdtGravaPedido.PedEnvCod = PedEnvCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedStsGer = PedStsGer &sdtGravaPedido.PedNovStsCod = PedNovStsCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedCliCodRaz_Nov = PedCliCodRaz_Nov
&sdtGravaPedido.PedVlrLiq = PedVlrLiq &sdtGravaPedido.PedSts = PedSts
&sdtGravaPedido.PedCliNfeCod = PedCliNfeCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedFilCodOciRef = PedFilCodOciRef
&sdtGravaPedido.PedEmbDes = PedEmbDes
&sdtGravaPedido.PedDtaVct = PedDtaVct &sdtGravaPedido.PedDtaFat = PedDtaFat //so carregar &sdtGravaPedido.PedIsImpCot = PedIsImpCot
&sdtGravaPedido.PedNfeChvRef = PedNfeChvRef &sdtGravaPedido.PedAnoSaf = PedAnoSaf &sdtGravaPedido.PedAnoOrc = PedAnoOrc &sdtGravaPedido.PedTlvCod = PedTlvCod
&sdtGravaPedido.PedPraParDesc = PedPraParDesc &sdtGravaPedido.PedObsEnt = PedObsEnt
&sdtGravaPedido.PedVeiPla = PedVeiPla &sdtGravaPedido.PedVeiKm = PedVeiKm
&sdtGravaPedido.PedObsInf = PedObsInf &sdtGravaPedido.PedEqpNom = PedEqpNom &sdtGravaPedido.PedEqpMar = PedEqpMar &sdtGravaPedido.PedEqpSer = PedEqpSer &sdtGravaPedido.PedEqpObs = PedEqpObs
Exit EndFor
